Phase 1
Authority & Audience Formation

Structured Programmes & Community

Phase 3
Institutional Foundation

Phase 4
Publishing & Intellectual Platform
  • Book manuscript development + publication pathway
  • Podcast long-form intellectual content platform
  • Waitlist + application system live
  • Alumni stories activated on website
  • Business Alchemy 2027 applications open

Programme
Pathways
Canvas
"What is this programme, who is it for, and what does it change?"
Conventional business canvas · ESSENSE reframe · side by side
2026 Programmes · Living document
"Makes Sense?" Talks
Online · Annual subscription · ~12 live conversations/year · Recording + meeting summary
Customer Segments Who is ready — the person at the threshold
  • Leaders who feel old maps no longer work — and new ones haven't been drawn yet
  • Founders & executives sensing the dissolution of dominant business models
  • Consultants building new frameworks for a changing world
  • ESSENSE alumni seeking ongoing collective inquiry
Core Tension What brought them here
The dominant models of business, leadership, and success are breaking down. Leaders feel it — in the exhaustion beneath their results, in questions they carry but can't place. Very few spaces say: let's sit with the dissolution together, and see what wants to emerge. Leaders are left feeling alone in their questioning.
What ESSENSE Offers The transformation — from → to
Isolated in questioning→Shared language + collective sensemaking
Waiting for someone else to redesign the future→Becoming its co-creator
Talk Topics — Season 1 One word. One question. Each talk holds it open.
  • Success — What if the thing we optimised for is the very thing depleting us?
  • Money — When does financial logic become a cage?
  • Speed — What are we running from?
  • Growth — What do we worship instead?
  • Strategy — Is it really made in the boardroom?
  • Shadow — What is running the organisation without our permission?
  • Nature / Future Ancestors / Togetherness / In Tune With Life
Key Activities How we work — methodology and container
  • Live online conversation built around one sharp, unresolved question
  • Host voice meets silence and questions of participants — something emerges
  • Recording + meeting summary included
  • Light pre-reads or prompts where relevant
  • ~12 sessions per year
Role in the ESSENSE Ecosystem Gateway + pathway
Annual subscription is the first "yes" into ESSENSE belonging — the primary relational entry gateway identifying most aligned future participants for deeper work.

→ Retreats & Immersions
→ Individual Journey
→ Business Redesign Lab
→ Business Alchemy (Flagship)
Key Resources What we steward — faculty, space, time
  • Founder's intellectual capital and facilitation
  • Topic research and synthesis
  • Community platform (Zoom + Circle/Heartbeat)
  • Content repurposing workflow (recordings → clips → posts)
  • Operations support
Revenue Streams Life-value exchange — investment and pricing
  • Annual subscription: £649 (11 sessions)
  • Break-even: 17 participants
  • Target 2026: 40 participants → £15,552 profit
  • Target 2027: 50 participants → £22,042 profit
Cost Structure What sustains this — operational foundations
Speaker £8,800 · Operations £622 · Producer £686 · Tools £300 → Total £10,408/year
Book Club + Podcast
Online · Free · Pilot May 2026
Customer Segments Who is ready — the person at the threshold
  • Founders and leaders at the edge of old models
  • Consultants and practitioners building intellectual frameworks
  • ESSENSE alumni continuing the journey
  • Curious new entrants to the ecosystem
Problem / Pain The tension they carry
Content consumed individually is rarely metabolised collectively. Most podcasts offer information without depth, leaving leaders without a sustained field for real thinking to unfold.
Value Proposition The transformation offered
Information without depth→Collective sensemaking field
Isolated thinking→Shared perception over time
Key Activities How we work
  • Curated author dialogues paired with applied business conversations
  • Reflective podcast episodes designed for integration
  • ESSENSE Book Club exploring foundational texts
  • Shared reflection spaces within ESSENSE community
Channels + Revenue How they find us · Life-value exchange
  • Organic: Spotify, Apple, LinkedIn, newsletter
  • Speaker networks and referrals
  • Free access — primary list-building and authority channel
  • Gateway into Talks, Retreats, Individual Journey, Lab
Your ESSENSE Day
In-person · 1 day · £500/participant · 2026–2028
Customer Segments Who is ready
  • Busy founders and executives considering deeper programmes
  • Prospects wanting a first physical ESSENSE experience
  • Leadership teams wanting shared language
Problem / Pain The tension they carry
Leaders want depth but cannot yet commit to a long programme. They need a single experience that creates enough clarity and trust to take the next step.
Value Proposition The transformation offered
Abstract curiosity→Embodied clarity in one day
Four bodies · Four elements: Earth / Water / Air / Fire → Aether (intent for Business)
Key Activities + Resources How we work · What we steward
  • 4 × 2-hour immersive blocks (8 hours total)
  • Body / Earth — Emotion / Water — Mental / Air — Causal / Fire
  • Closing: intent for business (Aether)
  • Venue logistics, facilitation, materials
Revenue Streams Life-value exchange
  • £500 per participant
  • Break-even: 10 participants
  • 15 participants → £2,031 profit (34% margin)
  • 20 participants → £3,881 profit (48% margin)
  • 2026: 1 day · 2027: 3 days · 2028: 4 days
Re/Sense the Feminine
Online Course · 3 modules · Open to all genders · Live sessions + self-paced practice
Who This Is For Explicitly open to all genders — this is fundamental to its design
The archetypal feminine — receptivity, embodied knowing, relational intelligence, cyclical thinking, the wisdom of the unknown — is a human inheritance, not a gendered one.

  • Women and men exploring feminine leadership dimensions
  • Leaders disconnected from embodied and relational intelligence
  • New audience entry-level participants
  • Consultants preparing for the practitioner pathway
Core Tension What brought them here
The feminine has been culturally assigned to women and simultaneously devalued, leaving both women and men impoverished: women carrying these capacities without authority, men cut off from them entirely. Most leadership development — and most frameworks for understanding ourselves — has left these dimensions largely absent from the map.
What ESSENSE Offers The transformation — from → to
Fragmented relational intelligence→Whole, adaptive leadership
Control-based operating→Regenerative, life-responsive presence
Three Modules — The Arc The same questions Campbell asked of the hero — asked of the full human being
  • Module 1 — Who Am I? Identity across conscious and unconscious layers — persona, nature, soul. Life line mapping, storytelling. Element of Earth.
  • Module 2 — Who Am I as Feminine? Jungian archetypes. Shadow work with the inner guardian. The Hero's Journey and the Heroine's Journey. Sacred Marriage — integrating masculine and feminine within. Elements of Earth, Water, Fire.
  • Module 3 — What Do I Really Want? Psychosynthesis, signals from the future. Inner child. Reclaiming authentic desire. Purpose, calling, the life one truly wishes to create. All four elements.
The Methodology Experiential throughout
  • Jungian psychology and archetypal work
  • Integral theory — four-quadrant model (I · We · It · Its)
  • Psychosynthesis and inner parts work
  • Somatic and embodied practices
  • Shadow work with inner guardian and inner child
  • Life line mapping and narrative inquiry
  • Creative practices: writing, drawing, storytelling
  • The Manifest — participant's companion document throughout
  • Naming ceremony: participants receive a new name from the group at the close
Four Elements as Guides Archetypal energies of consciousness — not decoration
  • Earth — grounds inquiry in the body and what is real
  • Water — opens emotional intelligence and the inner child
  • Fire — burns what no longer belongs, ignites authentic desire
  • Air — brings perspective, paradox, ability to hold complexity
The elements are a language for what the body already knows. The course teaches participants to read that language.
Revenue Streams Life-value exchange
  • £349 per participant
  • Break-even: 53 participants/year
  • 80 participants → £9,050 profit
  • 150 participants → £32,080 profit
  • 2026: 1 cohort · 2027–2028: 2 cohorts
Role in the ESSENSE Ecosystem Most accessible entry point · Intellectual companion to the Feminine Journey
The intellectual and experiential companion to the Feminine Journey Shadow Work Retreat — where this course offers conceptual depth and ongoing practice, the retreat offers embodied immersion. Available to people who cannot yet commit to in-person, and to men exploring this territory for the first time.

→ Feminine Journey — Shadow Work Retreat (Wales)
→ Individual Journey — 1-Year Developmental Track
→ Business Alchemy — Flagship Programme
→ Shadow Work for Leaders Retreat
Business Redesign Lab
6-month cohort · Founders & leadership teams · Online · June–November 2026
Customer Segments Who is ready
  • Founders and small leadership teams who sense their current business was built for a world that is changing faster than the organisation can keep up
  • Purpose-driven SMEs
  • Executives ready to redesign how their organisation operates as a living system
  • ESSENSE alumni and consultants
Core Tension What brought them here
Founders recognise their business models are running on logic that quietly stopped fitting. The tools they reach for — consultants, frameworks, restructuring plans — optimise the existing architecture rather than questioning whether it should exist in its current form at all. The deeper challenge: organisational redesign is inseparable from the inner development of the people leading it.
What ESSENSE Offers The transformation — from → to
Extractive architecture→Living system redesign
Isolated problem-solving→Collective intelligence + accountability
"The business I built reflects who I was. The one I am redesigning reflects who I am becoming."
Key Activities + Resources How we work — founder's inner OS and organisation's outer architecture developed together
  • Monthly cohort sessions (2.5h) over 6 months — six interconnected phases
  • Case clinics and real business challenges
  • ESSENSE frameworks, templates, diagnostics
  • Peer accountability and community moderation
  • Miro boards and worksheets
  • Cohort of founders navigating the same threshold — the peer field as one of the most powerful elements
Revenue Streams + Ecosystem Role Life-value exchange · Pathway
  • £660 per participant (£110 × 6 sessions)
  • Break-even: 11 participants
  • 25 participants → £9,666 profit (target 2026)
  • 30 participants → £12,966 profit (target 2027)
  • 2026: 1 cohort · 2027–2028: 2 cohorts
  • → Business Alchemy — Flagship
    → Mini Board — 1:1 Strategic Mentoring
    → ESSENSE Consulting Partnership (future)
Shadow Work for Leaders
Retreat & Immersion · 6 days · Closed group of 10–12 · Villa Terra Quinta, Portugal · August 2026
Customer Segments Who is ready
  • Founders and executives seeking embodied transformation
  • Leaders with patterns they recognise but cannot shift — a reaction that surprises them, a way of leading that gets results and costs too much
  • Those who have done cognitive work but not somatic integration
  • Anyone whose organisation is unconsciously recreating their inner world
Core Tension What brought them here
Many leadership patterns and organisational dysfunctions originate in unconscious psychological structures. Leaders learn to manage their triggers, perform composure, project authority — while deeper dynamics continue operating beneath the surface. Control cultures, burnout cultures, conflict avoidance: structural problems with psychological roots. Cognitive work alone cannot reach them.
What ESSENSE Offers The transformation — from → to
Unintegrated shadow driving decisions→Embodied maturity + clear leadership
Reactive, pattern-driven→Choosing from wholeness
The Methodology — Shadow Work Rooted in Jung · 40+ years of practice with Nikola & John Kurk
  • Four archetypal energies: Loving · Warrior · King · Magician
  • Four elements as containers: Earth · Fire · Water · Air
  • Both individual and collective group processes
  • Jungian psychology, somatic awareness, archetypal intelligence
  • Nikola and John Kurk — co-founders of Shadow Work Europe, 40+ years experience each
  • Inessa Golubova — Day 1–2 opening facilitation
Programme Arc — 6 Days Villa Terra Quinta · 40 km from Lisbon
  • Day 1 Arrival & Attunement — Earth and Fire. Grounding and ignition. Led by Inessa
  • Day 2 Deepening the Request — Water and Air. Clarifying what each participant is here to meet
  • Days 3–5 Shadow Work — Three full days of immersive work led by Nikola and John Kurk. Four archetypal energies
  • Day 6 Integration & Return — Rest, reflection, group closing. Integration practices for life and leadership
  • Accommodation, chef's meals, morning practices, sound healing, surfing class all included
What Participants Leave With The after
  • Hidden strength, creative energy, and resourcefulness — previously locked in shadow — now available as genuine leadership capacity
  • Measurably different relationship with own patterns: seeing them as they arise, working with them consciously
  • Greater psychological maturity — capacity to hold complexity, welcome discomfort, lead from wholeness
  • A small extraordinary group who have shared something real
  • A new quality of presence their teams will feel before they can name it
Revenue Streams Life-value exchange
  • £3,750 per participant (all-inclusive)
  • Break-even: 9 participants
  • 12 participants → £11,980 profit (27% margin)
  • 14 participants → £19,480 profit (37% margin)
  • 2026–2028: 2 retreats/year
Role in the ESSENSE Ecosystem The deepest accelerant in the Personal Development Field
The Shadow Work Retreat is transformation at the level of being — the experience that makes everything else in ESSENSE land differently, because the inner architecture has genuinely changed.

→ Individual Journey — 1-Year Developmental Track
→ Business Redesign Lab
→ Mini Board — 1:1 Strategic Mentoring
→ Business Alchemy — Flagship Programme
Leadership Essence Retreat
5 days · Urban-in-nature · London · Closed group · November 2026
An Invitation Who is ready
You move from meeting to decision to relationship to strategy, carrying more than you show. Somewhere in the rhythm of your leadership, the question of who you actually are — beneath the role, beneath the performance — has been waiting for a room with enough silence to be heard.

  • Founders and senior leaders at a leadership threshold
  • Leaders seeking deeper coherence between inner and outer
  • Those ready for multi-day developmental immersion
  • Closed group of 12
Core Tension What brought them here
Most leadership development addresses the outside of leadership. Leaders carry enormous complexity in isolation — with a nervous system not designed for this level of sustained pressure, and very limited training in how to work with the inner dynamics shaping every outer outcome. Functionally excellent and quietly depleted. Making good decisions and feeling the wrongness of them only afterwards.
What ESSENSE Offers The transformation — from → to
Success without coherence→Inner maturity + regenerative leadership
Performing leadership→Leading from essence
The Methodology Three bodies · Five days · One arc
The retreat works with the three foundational dimensions of a leader's presence: the mental body, the emotional body, and the somatic body. Each day goes deeper. Together they form a complete arc — from witnessing thought, through reclaiming emotional intelligence, to building a nervous system genuinely capable of holding complexity.

Jesse MacKey's work draws on: somatic intelligence, Jungian depth psychology, nervous system science, adult development theory, and the ancient wisdom of tantra as a technology of holding energy.
London — Urban-in-Nature Why here
Held in London — in a carefully chosen space that holds both the aliveness of the city and genuine access to nature. Gardens, parks, quiet grounds. Close enough to the world that participants do not need to leave their lives entirely; far enough inside a container that the world cannot follow them in.

The retreat does not ask leaders to escape their context — it asks them to develop the inner resources to inhabit it differently.
Lead Facilitator Jesse MacKey
Developmental practitioner and intellectual co-architect of ESSENSE's practitioner development pathway. Led transformative retreats for leaders across US, Australia, Europe for over two decades. Integrates somatic intelligence, nervous system science, Jungian depth, and adult development theory into practice that is rigorous, warm, and genuinely rare in its depth.
Revenue + Pathway Life-value exchange · What comes next
  • Pricing TBD
  • 2026: 1 retreat · 2027: 1 retreat · 2028: 2 retreats
Role in the ESSENSE Ecosystem Most accessible embodied entry point
The most accessible and immediate embodied entry point into the ESSENSE ecosystem. Requires no prior developmental work — only readiness to be genuinely present for five days. For many leaders, this is the experience that makes everything else in ESSENSE feel necessary.

→ Transformative Presence — Year-Long Practitioner Programme
→ Individual Journey — 1-Year Developmental Track
→ Shadow Work for Leaders Retreat
→ Business Alchemy — Flagship Programme
→ Mini Board — 1:1 Strategic Mentoring
Shadow Work Feminine Journey
Shadow Work Retreat for Women · 7 days · Closed circle of 12 · Wales, UK · 29 August – 4 September 2026
An Invitation Who is ready
You hold it together. Inside, you are tired. You are strong, capable, independent — and something feels muted, flat, quietly disconnected. You sense there is more. More depth. More fire. More joy. More of yourself.

  • Women founders and executives feeling muted, flat, disconnected
  • Women leaders holding everything together but feeling tired inside
  • Women seeking to reclaim emotional truth and inner power
  • Closed circle: 12 women
Core Tension What brought them here
Modern leadership culture has suppressed the capacities regenerative leadership depends on: anger, grief, softness, authority, the desire to be seen and not just useful. Women navigating this culture have placed these parts of themselves in shadow. A business built from a woman's full self — including what she has long kept hidden — is a different kind of creation entirely.
What ESSENSE Offers The transformation — from → to
Suppressed, performing→Whole, reclaimed, alive
Managing emotions→Emotions as doorways to power
The Four Gateways to Inner Power Not problems to be resolved — doorways back to wholeness
  • Fear — when integrated, becomes discernment
  • Anger — when reclaimed, becomes agency and clarity of boundary
  • Grief — when allowed, becomes capacity for genuine presence and love
  • Joy — when restored, becomes the renewable energy of a life lived from the inside out
Deep Shadow Work · somatic and embodied practices · partner work · group processes · nature as container
The Facilitators Who holds the field
  • Nicola Kurk — 30+ years Shadow Work, co-founder of Women in Power
  • Liz Remande-Guyard — 20+ years supporting women through complex life transitions
  • Inessa Golubova — Shadow Work facilitator, leadership mentor, founder of ESSENSE. Jungian psychology, Integral Theory, somatic practices and ritual
The Place Nevern Valley, Pembrokeshire, Wales
Wild landscape of ocean, forest, wind, silence, open sky. The land becomes part of the healing. Sauna, cold water, therapeutic dance, morning practices — the nervous system reset is part of the design.

Professional photoshoot at the end — capturing each woman's new state with care and sensitivity. A document of the transformation.
Revenue + Partners Life-value exchange · Who we co-create with
  • Pricing TBD (similar to Shadow Work for Leaders model)
  • Facilitators: Inessa Golubova, Nicola Kurk, Liz Remande-Guyard
  • Venue: Nevern Valley, Wales
Role in the ESSENSE Ecosystem Where the intellectual reframing becomes lived experience
Sits at the intersection of Shadow Work and the Re/Sense the Feminine thread — the embodied, immersive complement to the Re/Sense the Feminine online course. For women in the ESSENSE ecosystem, this is often the experience that makes their leadership feel genuinely their own for the first time.

→ Re/Sense the Feminine — Online Course
→ Individual Journey — 1-Year Developmental Track
→ Shadow Work for Leaders Retreat
→ Business Alchemy — Flagship Programme
ESSENSE Individual Journey
1:1 coaching · 1 year · Premium · Limited capacity · 2026
Customer Segments Who is ready
  • Founders and executives needing privacy and personalisation
  • C-suite leaders who won't join a cohort
  • Leaders integrating health and developmental coaching
  • Those undergoing major life and organisational transitions
Problem / Pain The tension they carry
Leaders undergoing deep personal transformation lack sustained, high-quality developmental support integrating psychological growth, leadership maturity, and strategic decision-making. Inner evolution outpaces external adaptation.
Value Proposition The transformation offered
Inner growth without integration→Leadership maturity + aligned decisions
Isolated in complexity→Supported developmental arc
Key Activities + Resources How we work
  • 1:1 coaching sessions (2 per month)
  • Personalised planning and tracking
  • Integration support between sessions
  • Assessment tools and protocols (GeneKeys, Enneagram, LDP)
  • ESSENSE founders + 3 permanent external coach partners
Revenue Streams Life-value exchange
  • £500 per session · 10 sessions = £5,000 (6 months)
  • 20 sessions = £10,000 (1 year)
  • External coaches: 60% coach / 40% ESSENSE
  • 10 clients × £10,000 → ESSENSE net: ~£36,873/year
  • Founders keep 100% of their own client fees
Mini-Board with ESSENSE
1:1 strategic advisory · Year-long · £20,000/client · Founders only · 2026
Customer Segments Who is ready
  • Founders and family business owners
  • CEOs with £1–10m+ revenue
  • Leaders who want an "external board of wisdom" not an executive coach
  • Those navigating complex decisions under pressure
Problem / Pain The tension they carry
Founders carry immense responsibility without access to a space for clear thinking, deep reflection, and meaningful dialogue. Most advisory relationships focus on execution, leaving no room for sensemaking or the deeper questions shaping the future.
Value Proposition The transformation offered
Strategic isolation→Systemic clarity + coherent action
Deciding from urgency→Leading from integrated awareness
Key Activities + Method How we work — whole-system stewardship
  • Monthly full-day session (in-person or hybrid)
  • Strategy review, shadow work, decisions, systems design
  • Integration of psychotherapy, adult development, leadership strategy
  • 12-month container — high trust, retained, long-term
  • 2 ESSENSE founders as mentors and strategic partners
Revenue Streams Life-value exchange
  • £20,000 per client per year
  • Break-even: 1 client
  • Total ops cost: £542/client
  • 2 clients → £40,000 · 4 clients → £80,000
  • Referral / network / flagship alumni / retreats pipeline
Business Alchemy
Flagship · 9 months + 2-month pre-programme · Year-long cohort · Application & waitlist · Launches January 2027
Customer Segments Who is ready — the person at the threshold
  • Founders, senior executives and organisational leaders who have achieved significant external results
  • Leaders whose inner evolution has outpaced the architecture of what they created
  • Those ready to question the assumptions beneath their success
  • ESSENSE alumni ready for the full alchemical arc
  • "I've built success — but something essential is missing"
Core Tension What brought them here
Successful founders reach a point where external achievement no longer provides clarity and meaning. Traditional business education addresses this with more frameworks and optimisation — operating at the surface, never at the source: the relationship between the consciousness of the creator and the living system they are responsible for.
What ESSENSE Offers The transformation — from → to
Success without coherence→Creator–Creation alignment
Extraction-based business→Love, stewardship, generative creation
New strategy→Rebirth — enterprise as living system
The Alchemical Framework Programme arc — classical stages of transformation
Calcination · Dissolution · Separation · Conjunction · Fermentation · Distillation
  • Pre-Programme (2 months) — GeneKeys, LDP & Enneagram. Mapping current state across ME · WE · WORLD
  • M1 Foundations of Creation — Self and Source. Cosmology, Hermetic principles. Calcination
  • M2 Nature as Creator & Teacher — Geology, ecology, indigenous wisdom, elemental rituals. Calcination → Dissolution
  • M3 The Human Place — Karma Audit of the business. Separation
  • M4 Lovemaking — Shadow work. Masculine & feminine integration. Conjunction
  • M5 Time and Timeless — Chronos, Kairos, quantum time. Shiva and Shakti. Fermentation
  • M6 Sustaining & Emerging — Living systems. Rite of Passage. Fermentation
  • M7 Value Creation & Manifestation — Re-essenced business identity. Eisteddfod celebration. Distillation
Channels How they find us — resonance pathways
  • Talks → Lab → Flagship pipeline
  • Podcast and Book Club audience
  • Retreat participants graduating to flagship
  • Referrals from alumni and faculty
  • Thought leadership and application funnel
Key Partners Who we co-create with
  • Retreat venues and residential centres
  • Guest faculty and senior experts
  • Operations and logistics partners
  • Production support
  • Alumni and referral network
Key Resources + What Participants Leave With What we steward — and what is transformed
  • ESSENSE IP, curriculum, and alchemical methodology
  • Founder facilitation and intellectual capital
  • Assessment tools: GeneKeys, Enneagram, Vertical Development Profile
  • A re-essenced business identity — strategy, culture, operating rhythm aligned with life-value principles
  • The capacity to lead from embodied coherence: self, organisation, and planetary systems as one integrated field
  • Transformed personal and corporate patterns — extractive logics dissolved and replaced by something genuinely regenerative
  • A cohort of soulmates — a living relational field long after the programme ends
  • A business they do not need to escape
Revenue Streams Life-value exchange — investment and pricing
  • £14,500 per participant (all-inclusive option)
  • Break-even: 14–18 participants (depending on model)
  • 20 participants → £90,578 profit (31% margin)
  • 24 participants → £148,578 profit (43% margin)
  • 2027: first cohort · 2028: second cohort
  • → ESSENSE Faculty Pathway
    → ESSENSE Consulting Method & Development Partnership (future)
Cost Structure What sustains this — operational foundations
Accommodation £51,700 · Speaker delivery £126,000 · Producer £12,207 · Operations £9,165 · Tools £350 → Total ~£199,422 per cohort
Transformative Presence
For Consultants, Coaches & Developmental Practitioners · 4 modules · 5 days each · In-person · Cohort of 12 · 1 year · Launch April 2027
Customer Segments Who is ready — the person at the threshold
  • Consultants, coaches, facilitators, and developmental practitioners who want to work more powerfully with the complexity they encounter in the field
  • Practitioners who recognise the ceiling: moments where their own reactivity limits what becomes possible
  • Leaders wanting to become stewards of cultural self-regeneration
  • 12-person cohort · highly selective
Core Tension What brought them here
The world consultants operate in has changed. Two forms of complexity now define it: social complexity (every person in a room constructs reality differently) and generative complexity (futures organisations face can no longer be predicted from the past). Most practitioner training develops knowledge and frameworks — not the inner capacities that allow someone to stay genuinely present under pressure, to hold a field with real authority.
What ESSENSE Offers The transformation — from → to
Technically skilled but reactive→Transformatively present — mental, somatic, emotional
Managing complexity from outside→Participating & enacting — helping culture become self-regenerating
Urban-in-nature container · 1-year programme with supervision + community of practice
The Six Capacities Trainable skills — practised, assessed, developed progressively
Mental — Witnessing Thought: observing thought without being identified with it. Construct-awareness.
Emotional — Willingness to Feel: staying present with unwanted emotions rather than suppressing or performing around them.
Somatic — Distress Tolerance & Containment: building vagal tone, nervous system regulation.
Integrative — Passionate Detachment: present and witnessing simultaneously. Involved without being captured.
Relational — Witnessing Systems: reading group dynamics and field conditions while actively participating in them.
Transformational — Emotional Aikido: shifting others' emotional states without force, without their awareness, without losing one's own ground.
Key Activities + Method Four modules · Five days each · UK
  • M1 Apr 21–25, 2027 · M2 Jun 16–20 · M3 Sep 15–19 · M4 Nov 17–21 · Q2 2028 closing
  • 5-day in-person immersion per module · 12-person cohort
  • Six to seven weeks between modules — momentum + integration
  • Supervision and peer intervision groups between modules
  • Participants practise in own client work, bring real cases back
  • Certification awarded on assessed capacity — woven into module design
Programme Lead Jesse MacKey
Co-founder of the first cohort of the Integral Institute in Canada. Over two decades working with leaders and organisations at the frontier of developmental psychology, adult development theory, and transformative practice. Brings the capacity to work simultaneously at the level of the individual nervous system, the group field, and the systemic architecture of an organisation — and to train others to do the same.
Practitioner Capacities — System Level What enables transformative presence in the field
  • Own ego-witnessing (without dissociation)
  • Passionate detachment — witnessing thought without being consumed by it
  • Distress tolerance — capacity to stay present with somatic discomfort and intensity
  • Capacity to create and enact oneself moment-to-moment
  • System-witnessing — emotional aikido (helping others change state, often unknowingly)
Revenue + Pathway Life-value exchange · Financial model
  • £6,550 per participant · 20 participants per cohort
  • Annual revenue: £131,000 · Annual cost: £61,400
  • Annual profit: £69,600 · Margin: 53.1%
  • Break-even: 10 participants
  • Launch: 1 cohort 2027 · Expansion 2028+
  • → Ecosystem Architect — Certification Programme (2029)
    → ESSENSE Consulting Method & Development Partnership
    → Business Alchemy — Flagship Programme
    → ESSENSE Faculty Pathway
Cost Structure What sustains this — operational foundations
Facilitator time cost £17,400 · Variable costs (catering, royalty, per-head) £24,000 · Fixed costs per cohort (venue) £20,000 → Total cost per cohort: £61,400
ESSENSE
BUSINESS SCHOOL
Re—sense · Re—fine · Re—design · Re—source
Programme Architecture · March 2026 · Website launch April 2026
ESSENSE
BUSINESS
SCHOOL
In Tune.
Feel Alive.
Business, in tune with life.
Re—sense
what matters.
A living school for
living businesses.
THE MISSION
Business,
in tune
with life.

Essense Business School exists to help us re-sense the meaning of business and bring business back in tune with life, so it becomes a life-value creating force. Life-value is the value a business creates that supports the life of the planet and all its life forms, now and in the future.

"In tune with life" means a business designed by a human who feels like a part of the living ecosystem. Naturally, their creation shall stay human, live, subject to natural limits, cycles, seasons, and place. As a living organism, the business interacts with and creates value for other elements of the ecosystem — as a whole, not only to sustain itself.

This is only possible if and when the creator is whole and free — inner clarity and coherence create agency and responsibility. So we start with the creator — enable them to re-sense and re-design their business to generate life.

VALUE PROPOSITION
Build a business
in tune with life.

We inspire leaders to shift how they make meaning — their inner operating system that in turn shapes what they notice, value, and how they relate to the world.

As that capacity grows, inner clarity becomes outer coherence — across strategy, decision-making, culture, operating rhythm, and naturally, bottomline.

Guided by life-value, not abstract growth, leaders design businesses that support the whole living systems we depend on — both human and non-human forms of life.

Supported by a shared community of teachers, peers, and alumni, they build business they do not need to escape.

INSIGHT INTO INSIDE · WORKING PHILOSOPHY
How we
work together.
01
Spirit of collective intelligence — we co-sense, co-think, co-design, co-deliver. Complementarity of backgrounds, tastes, capabilities, life experience, elements.
02
Walk the talk — be a business we teach to design. Alive, human, humble and bold, attuned to the life phases of each colleague.
03
Stay in the listening mode — learn, not know. Don't push for certainty — it is false safety. Keep focused attention, be ready to let go.
04
Be generous when you can. Say clearly when you can't.
05
Have a warm and peaceful heart, open mind, cold belly, and free voice.
—
ESSENSE is designed as a living ecosystem of learning and community life.
THE LIVING ECOSYSTEM
Roots, Trunk,
Branches & Fruits.
LAYER ELEMENT WHAT IT HOLDS
🌱 Roots
Grounding		 Administration — operational coordination · Finance & Fundraising — sustainability and growth · Marketing & Communications — visibility and storytelling. Without strong roots the ecosystem cannot grow.
🌳 Trunk
Core Energy		 Philosophical direction · tone, language and archetypal layer · the field and voice of the brand · academic depth and learning experience · ecosystem architecture and operational structure. The trunk holds the living force of ESSENSE.
🌿 Branches
Learning Experiences		 Flagship programmes · retreats · leadership journeys · other pathways. Growing from the core: Learning Technologies — frameworks, tools, platform · Producing — content, speakers, books · Community — dialogue, peer exchange, gatherings · Physical Spaces — retreat centres, ESSENSE home/studio.
🍎 Fruits
New Knowledge & Initiatives		 Collaborations · innovation projects · new learning formats · emerging leaders and communities. Programmes feed community; community feeds knowledge creation; knowledge feeds technologies; physical spaces anchor the ecosystem in the world.
LEADERSHIP MODEL · THREE CENTRES
How the three
centres work together.
Co-Founder · Inesa
The Voice, Creative-Development
and Community
  • The Voice of ESSENSE — Interviews, podcasts, public talks, texts, manifestos and storytelling of the brand. How ESSENSE sounds and appears in the world.
  • Art Direction — Defines the visual and aesthetic code: the visual language, atmosphere, how programmes, media, materials and retreat spaces look and feel.
  • Community Development — Builds and stewards the ESSENSE community: its culture, rituals, peer connections and long-term belonging.
  • In essence — Inesa holds the soul, voice, image and living community of ESSENSE.
Co-Founder · Anastasiya
Academic Core &
Learning Experience
  • Academic framework and methodology — Defines the conceptual frameworks, curricula, intellectual depth and coherence of learning journeys. Ensures everything remains methodologically sound.
  • Learning experience — Designs how participants experience the journey: module structures, rhythm, interaction formats, integration practices, reflection and support.
  • Quality standards and evaluation — Defines what constitutes a "high-quality ESSENSE experience", establishes evaluation tools and improves programmes based on real data.
  • Faculty and learning stewards — Selects and develops teachers and facilitators, ensuring alignment with the academic core and ESSENSE approach.
  • Holds the intellectual and pedagogical integrity of ESSENSE — ensuring the ecosystem is not only inspiring but also structurally sound and professionally delivered.
CEO & Ecosystem Architect
Architect of
the Ecosystem
  • Ecosystem architecture — Designs the overall map of ESSENSE: how different "biomes" connect, how participants move between them, and how the field, academic architecture and business model interact.
  • Business model and sustainability — Builds a financially sustainable 3–5 year model: revenue streams, cost structures, investments and growth horizons.
  • Operating system — Creates processes, roles, rhythms and reporting systems. Ensures programmes, partnerships and content launch predictably without constant manual control.
  • Embedding partnerships — Turns relationships initiated by co-founders into sustainable formats, agreements and operational processes.
  • The CEO holds form, structure and viability, allowing the field and academic depth of the co-founders to breathe freely.
WHAT IS SUCCESS?
How we know
we are thriving.
A Sticky Place
For participants, ESSENSE has become a place of life learning, abundant in learning opportunities that stay "at par with and ahead of" their evolving capacity and agency for life and business, at any given moment. A non-conventional curriculum, delivered in various formats and tastes, various learning paths that deepen and broaden their human selves and their businesses.
A Peer-Learning Place
Within cohorts, between cohorts and individuals — authentic and sound relationships between generations and lineages, respectful and liberating towards one another. Participants are easy to form learning groups, join each other's projects, help each other, contribute to our joint body of knowledge.
A Place of Learning Innovation
In business education and in business practice — a living innovation bank, with ideas, experimentation protocols, testing results and action research. ESSENSE is a learning community of choice for world-class inspirational teachers and practitioners: bold vision, honest delivery, authentic culture, inspired students, and fair contribution/profit sharing agreements.
A Sound Economic Foundation
Initial equity investments recuperated within 3–5 years of operation. Medium operational profit margin. A large share of profit re-invested within the first 3–4 years, and a smaller share invested into a cause. From year 3–4 — a fund created to support alumni's cause-initiatives.
"A business in tune with life is built by a human who feels like part of the living ecosystem."
ESSENSE is a learning community of choice for world-class inspirational teachers and practitioners — bold vision, honest delivery, authentic culture, inspired students, and fair contribution agreements.

The three centres work together: Inesa sets the field. Anastasiya transforms it into rigorous learning. The CEO turns both into a sustainable, breathing ecosystem.

A reflection for founders & leaders

What kind of leader
are you becoming?

Takes about three minutes

1 / 8

Your reflection

At ESSENSE, we don't
teach answers.

"I cannot teach anybody anything.
I can only make them think."

— Socrates

We believe the most important questions are the ones you carry with you. The ones that stay. The ones that quietly reshape how you see everything else.

Which of these questions stayed with you?

This is your starting point.

No noise. Only what matters.

Start again
